proof_groups.proof_strategy: For each witness unfold the return-witness definition, select the second disjunct, introduce the parameters, destruct nodes, simplify xizi_dll_first_value/xizi_dll_head_value, and preserve xizi_dllseg by identity. In return_wit_1 unfold xizi_dllseg only in the impossible cons case to obtain first <> linklist_pre against PreH1. In return_wit_2 the nil case contradicts PreH1 through the simplified PreH2, while the cons case closes from PreH2.

per_witness_plan.proof_of_xizi_double_link_head_return_wi: right; intros; destruct nodes; nil closes by head-value reduction and spatial identity; cons closes by contradiction between PreH1 and the pure non-sentinel fact exposed from xizi_dllseg
right; intros; destruct nodes; nil contradicts PreH1 via simplified PreH2; cons obtains the head equality from simplified PreH2; cancel the unchanged xizi_dllseg

vc_shape.common_pre_spatial: xizi_dllseg first linklist_pre linklist_pre last nodes
vc_shape.pure_split: return_wit_1 proves 0 = head_value under first=sentinel; return_wit_2 proves first=head_value under first<>sentinel

proof_groups.space_plan: Frame/cancel xizi_dllseg unchanged; expose its pure cons-case prefix only for return_wit_1 contradiction.
proof_groups.pure_plan: Destruct nodes and simplify the two mathematical list destructors; use exactly PreH1, PreH2, and return_wit_1's xizi_dllseg non-sentinel fact.

premise_discharge.definitions: xizi_dll_first_value and xizi_dll_head_value reduce on nodes
premise_discharge.empty_nonempty_branch_facts: from PreH1/PreH2 and, for return_wit_1 cons, the pure prefix of xizi_dllseg

proof_groups.grouping_reason: Both witnesses share a single compact list-destructor/framing proof pattern and have no dependency or helper boundary; one group minimizes workers while respecting max_witnesses_per_group=12.
